About Me

Cloud and DevOps systems built with reliability in mind

I build cloud and DevOps systems that are reliable, repeatable, and easier to support when things go wrong.

I bring over a decade of IT experience, including four focused years in cloud and DevOps engineering. My journey started in IT operations and systems coordination, where I learned that most technical failures aren’t random. They often trace back to how systems were designed, how access was controlled, how changes were released, and how visible the environment was when something broke.

That’s where my background in Computer Science and Risk Management shapes how I work. I don’t see CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure-as-code, observability, access control, and documentation as separate tasks. I see them as controls that reduce operational risk, support faster recovery, and leave infrastructure in a state the next engineer can actually understand.

Over the past four years, I’ve applied that lens in practice: provisioning cloud environments, building and improving delivery workflows, containerizing applications, strengthening environments with IAM and audit logging, and documenting systems so teams aren’t guessing during incidents.

When I join a team, I bring more than tool experience. I bring an operations mindset, a risk-aware approach, and a habit of asking why something failed before simply patching it.

I’m open to DevOps Engineer, Cloud Engineer, Platform Engineer, Infrastructure Engineer, and SRE roles.

Projects

Featured DevOps Projects

AWS Cloud-Native SIEM with OpenSearch

Built a cloud-native security monitoring and logging platform on AWS using OpenSearch. The project focuses on centralized log collection, IAM-aware access, KMS encryption, index lifecycle practices, audit visibility, and operational documentation for investigating security and infrastructure events.

AWSOpenSearchSIEMIAMKMS
View Repository →

End-to-End Travel Agency Application

Designed and built an end-to-end travel agency application that demonstrates full application delivery from source code to deployment. The project highlights practical software delivery, environment setup, application structure, and the foundation for future DevOps improvements such as CI/CD, containerization, and cloud deployment.

Application DeliveryDevOpsCI/CD ReadyCloud Ready
View Repository →

AWS VPC Networking Project

Built an AWS networking project focused on VPC design, public and private subnets, route tables, internet access, security groups, and secure EC2 connectivity.

AWS VPCEC2SubnetsSecurity Groups
